mapper.select: SELECT * FROM enterprise_talent_statistics WHERE enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} ORDER BY stat_date DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT DISTINCT enterprise_id FROM enterprise_talent_statistics WHERE enterprise_id IS NOT NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE enterprise_talent_statistics SET total_favorites = GREATEST(IFNULL(total_favorites, 0) + IFNULL(#{totalFavoritesDelta}, 0), 0), new_favorites = GREATEST(IFNULL(new_favorites, 0) + IFNULL(#{newFavoritesDelta}, 0), 0), total_contacts = GREATEST(IFNULL(total_contacts, 0) + IFNULL(#{totalContactsDelta}, 0), 0), new_contacts = GREATEST(IFNULL(new_contacts, 0) + IFNULL(#{newContactsDelta}, 0), 0), total_interviews = GREATEST(IFNULL(total_interviews, 0) + IFNULL(#{totalInterviewsDelta}, 0), 0), new_interviews = GREATEST(IFNULL(new_interviews, 0) + IFNULL(#{newInterviewsDelta}, 0), 0), total_hires = GREATEST(IFNULL(total_hires, 0) + IFNULL(#{totalHiresDelta}, 0), 0), new_hires = GREATEST(IFNULL(new_hires, 0) + IFNULL(#{newHiresDelta}, 0), 0), total_searches = GREATEST(IFNULL(total_searches, 0) + IFNULL(#{totalSearchesDelta}, 0), 0) WHERE enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} AND stat_date = #{statDate}
